prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低位次分别约为5971名、5999名、5596名、5925名、5441名，整体在5400–6000名区间波动，2025年回升至5441名为近5年最佳，显示 报考热度有所上升；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021年43人、2022年40人、2023年41人、2024年39人、2025年42人、2026年（招生计划文件）44人，2026年较 2025年小幅扩招2人，扩招幅度约4.8%，对竞争压力有轻微缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 重庆大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第34名， 近年排名稳定在33–34名区间，属于中坚985层次；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及实验室安全事故（1死3伤），可能对考生报考心理产生一定负面 影响；抖音热度排名第23（较热），短视频平台有一定关注度；历史投档异常记录中未见重大断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，土木工程获评A+，机械工程、环境 科学与工程、电气工程、风景园林学获评A-，工科实力突出，与当前社会热门的电气、计算机、电子信息等专业方向高度契合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通 信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，与重庆大学优势工科方向吻合，有利于吸引高分考生；北京市2026年普通高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434 人增加约29.7%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧；重庆大学 位于重庆市（西南地区），对北京考生而言属于跨省就读，地域偏好因素相对中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合20 25年基准位次5441名、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（42→44人，缓解竞争约4.8%）、北京市考生总数大幅增加（65434→84900人，加剧竞争约29.7%）、声誉偏负面（实验室事故）以 及工科优势专业持续高热等因素，供需矛盾总体加剧，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约5651名，区间5151–6151名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越计划）（含电气工程及其自动化、计算机科学与技术等）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 工科试验班（计算机与智能软件）（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、人工智能等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（含通信工程、自动化、电子信息工程等）
- 工科试验班（智能汽车领航班）（含车辆工程、人工智能等智能汽车领域相关专业）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造）（含机械设计制造及其自动化、车辆工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源与先进材料）（含能源与动力工程、材料科学与工程等）
- 工科试验班（医工交叉与环化健康）（含生物医学工程、药学、环境工程等）
- 理科试验班（数理基础）（含数学与应用数学、物理学、统计学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5651名，区间5151–6151名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档工科试验班为主攻方向，一档卓越计划/电气工程/计算机类可冲刺，三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间 下限（5151名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 5971, 5999, 5596, 5925, and 5441 respectively, fluctuating within the 5400–6000 range. In 2025, it rebounded to 5441, the best in the past five years, indicating an increase in application popularity. The university's enrollment plan for Beijing's comprehensive category was 43 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 39 in 2024, 42 in 2025, and 44 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). In 2026, there is a slight expansion of 2 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 4.8%, which slightly alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chongqing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 34th, with recent rankings stable in the 33–34 range, placing it among the mid-tier 985 universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a laboratory safety accident (1 death, 3 injuries), which may have a certain negative impact on candidates' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 23rd (relatively hot), indicating some attention on short video platforms. There are no major historical admission anomalies or signs of significant drops. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, civil engineering was rated A+, and mechanical engineering, environmental science and engineering, electrical engineering, and landscape architecture were rated A-, highlighting strong engineering capabilities that align well with currently popular fields such as electrical engineering, computer science, and electronic information.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, matching Chongqing University's advantageous engineering directions and helping attract high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Beijing is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing (southwest region), which for Beijing candidates means studying across provinces, with regional preference factors being relatively neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5441, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (42→44, alleviating competition by about 4.8%), the significant increase in the total number of Beijing candidates (65,434→84,900, intensifying competition by about 29.7%), the negative reputation (laboratory accident), and the sustained high popularity of advantageous engineering majors, the overall supply-demand contradiction is intensifying. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5651, with a range of 5151–6151.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan) (including Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology, etc.)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Intelligent Software) (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (including Communication Engineering, Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Vehicle Leading Class) (including Vehicle Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, and other smart vehicle-related fields)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Vehicle Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Advanced Materials) (including Energy and Power Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross and Environmental Chemistry Health) (including Biomedical Engineering, Pharmacy, Environmental Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics Foundation) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Statistics, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 5651, with a range of 5151–6151. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 engineering experimental classes as the main direction, with Tier 1 Excellence Plan/Electrical Engineering/Computer Science as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 5151), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
